testcase.name: test_tax_rates_returns_4_rates
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration58_database_reset.py:142: in test_tax_rates_returns_4_rates assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_currencies_returns_5_currencies

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 10 == 5 + where 10 = len([{'code': 'DZD', 'id': '77da259c-b419-43f2-8597-f9effeaa0e3d', 'is_active': True, 'is_default': True, ...}, {'code': 'USD', 'id': '979700ef-3b6a-4da4-a5da-8295e18d019d', 'is_active': True, 'is_default': False, ...}, {'code': 'EUR', 'id': 'e6b11afb-bd7e-4b4c-a934-cbc912037603', 'is_active': True, 'is_default': False, ...}, {'code': 'GBP', 'id': 'bc2478e0-a4f1-48d6-88b1-c98edd6e4536', 'is_active': True, 'is_default': False, ...}, {'code': 'SAR', 'id': 'd5d98005-c120-46a0-a4ed-e66492471b4b', 'is_active': True, 'is_default': False, ...}, {'code': 'AED', 'id': '5046a39a-3144-41ed-a86f-b21fea4987a1', 'is_active': True, 'is_default': False, ...}, ...])

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration58_database_reset.py:167: in test_currencies_returns_5_currencies assert len(data) == 5 E AssertionError: assert 10 == 5 E + where 10 = len([{'code': 'DZD', 'id': '77da259c-b419-43f2-8597-f9effeaa0e3d', 'is_active': True, 'is_default': True, ...}, {'code': 'USD', 'id': '979700ef-3b6a-4da4-a5da-8295e18d019d', 'is_active': True, 'is_default': False, ...}, {'code': 'EUR', 'id': 'e6b11afb-bd7e-4b4c-a934-cbc912037603', 'is_active': True, 'is_default': False, ...}, {'code': 'GBP', 'id': 'bc2478e0-a4f1-48d6-88b1-c98edd6e4536', 'is_active': True, 'is_default': False, ...}, {'code': 'SAR', 'id': 'd5d98005-c120-46a0-a4ed-e66492471b4b', 'is_active': True, 'is_default': False, ...}, {'code': 'AED', 'id': '5046a39a-3144-41ed-a86f-b21fea4987a1', 'is_active': True, 'is_default': False, ...}, ...])
